title: pinguicula lusitanica
intro: Pinguicula lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese butterwort or Mexican butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pinguicula lusitanica include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be harvested and dried to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
